name: Roza Russkikh
summary: Full-stack software engineer with 4+ years of experience, recently focused on AI-powered systems and agentic workflows in production. Hands-on experience with LLM integration, RAG pipelines, and human-in-the-loop automation.

bullets: Contributed to building a production agentic AI workflow using GPT-4o that processes client emails, classifies intent, and routes tasks through a human-in-the-loop Slack integration before writing to Airtable — orchestrated with LittleHorse workflow engine
Fixed bugs and improved the reviewer feedback loop — approve/reject buttons, free-text edit handling, intent classification, and inline clarification
Worked on an offline eval pipeline with precision/recall scorers to detect LLM regressions before production deployment

Built Angular + Python/FastAPI RAG dashboard integrating Azure AI Search and Azure Blob Storage for document ingestion, vector search, and embeddings — including web crawling and Zendesk API integration as data sources
Supported development of a fintech partner portal — built Angular UI components and REST API integrations for merchant onboarding platform
Developed client-facing Next.js applications with Tailwind CSS, Sanity CMS, and server-side logic
Contributed to full-stack React/Next.js/TypeScript applications across 6+ client projects
Implemented serverless features on AWS (Lambda, S3, Bridge) and automated E2E testing with Cypress
Functional and regression testing across web, mobile, and desktop applications
